case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ALVIN M VITAL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17066052)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-27-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16356052), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED SEP-27-2016, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE OCT-04-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT VITAL, ALVIN M

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-27-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-24-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VITAL, ALVIN M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-07-2016
